# opsboard-worktree-task

Start one approved OPSBOARD git-bug issue in an isolated external Git worktree. Use when assigning an implementer or reviewer, creating a task branch, recording a handoff, or checking that a gate permits work to begin.

This prompt delegates to the agent skill at `../skills/opsboard-worktree-task/`.

## Skill Location

- **Path:** `../skills/opsboard-worktree-task/`
- **Manifest:** `../skills/opsboard-worktree-task/SKILL.md`

## Usage

Invoke this skill by typing `/opsboard-worktree-task` in the Copilot chat.
